# [CHECKLIST TYPE] Checklist: [FEATURE NAME]

**Purpose**: [Brief description of what this checklist covers]
**Created**: [DATE]
**Feature**: [Link to spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, or relevant documentation]

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. Replace all sample items.

## Constitution And Scope

- [ ] CHK001 Feature preserves Bondstone as a library for durable module boundaries
- [ ] CHK002 Affected packages, tests, docs, samples, and SpecKit artifacts are named explicitly
- [ ] CHK003 Out-of-scope runtime ownership is stated when transport, hosting, persistence, or operations are involved

## Package Boundary And API

- [ ] CHK004 Package dependency direction is unchanged or justified in the plan
- [ ] CHK005 Public/protected API changes have compatibility notes and baseline review
- [ ] CHK006 Production package collaboration avoids `InternalsVisibleTo`

## Durable Behavior

- [ ] CHK007 Durable identities are stable and explicit
- [ ] CHK008 Command, integration-event, and domain-event semantics remain distinct
- [ ] CHK009 Outbox, inbox, operation, transport, and hosting ownership boundaries match `docs/architecture.md`

## Persistence, Transport, And Operations

- [ ] CHK010 EF/PostgreSQL behavior is verified with a real provider when relational semantics matter
- [ ] CHK011 Broker topology, credentials, native retry, dead-letter, prefetch/concurrency, and monitoring remain application-owned unless architecture changed
- [ ] CHK012 Consumer-owned migrations, retention, replay, purge, and recovery responsibilities are documented when affected

## Verification And Docs

- [ ] CHK013 Focused tests cover the changed behavior
- [ ] CHK014 `Unit`, `Application`, `Integration`, and `Package` categories are used consistently
- [ ] CHK015 Consumer-facing docs, package READMEs, architecture, packaging, testing, or operations docs are updated where behavior changes
- [ ] CHK016 Final verification commands are recorded in `tasks.md` or handoff notes
